approved_control.confirmed_meaning: Repair the HTTPS proxy benchmark credibility chain by changing the harness, result generation, evidence gates, and repository-facing claim so SOTA is not accepted when explained by fixture scheduling, fixed order, small samples, or aggregation artifacts.
required_answer_path: Audit contamination sources and classify old evidence limits.
Choose and implement a fixture or equivalent control that bounds proxy send scheduling influence.
Randomize or interleave ylong/libcurl execution and persist order metadata.
Compute paired ratios with uncertainty and demote ratio-of-mean-only claims.
Persist trace attribution fields and reject/downgrade proxy-send-dominated cells.
Run semantic tests and a repaired benchmark matrix before deciding the SOTA claim.
Update README/report evidence so old results are historical when repaired gates supersede them.
Apply final counterexample and human gates before completion or public claim-changing actions.
what_is_not_enough_avoided: README-only explanation of the 0.890x cell is not enough.
Old gen005 numbers alone are not enough.
curl CLI evidence is not a same-process libcurl baseline.
A SOTA verdict cannot be based on ratio-of-mean throughput alone under high variance.
mismatched fixture scheduling cannot be accepted as client performance.

required_steps.transition: Audit existing HTTPS proxy benchmark contamination sources and classify Python proxy send timing, fixed order, small samples, and aggregation distortion.
Implement a stable proxy/origin fixture or equivalent controls so canonical results are attributable to client behavior.
Implement client ordering control plus paired aggregation and confidence/uncertainty reporting.
Persist trace attribution fields and enforce proxy send time anomaly gates before any SOTA verdict.
Run focused semantic tests covering benchmark ordering, trace parsing, anomaly gates, paired stats, and figure data semantics.
Run or import repaired benchmark evidence and compare it with old gen005 evidence including the 0.890x cell.
Update README/report/figure evidence chain and decide preserve, downgrade, or withdraw SOTA under repaired evidence.
Run final independent Counterexample Gate and enforce human gates for claim-changing push/tag/live/external actions.
